title: Road to Rio
writer: Margarete-Maria Langen, Bobby E. Lüthge, Friedrich Nietzsche
actors: Maria Matray, Oscar Homolka, Oscar Marion
plot: The stenographer Inge and her fiance Karl go on a joyride and commit a hit-and-run after running down a child in the road. The landlady of a dubious inn, who finds out about their flight, turns over Inge to an Argentinian pimp and...
